next_steps: Obtain complete blood count with differential and inflammatory markers (CRP and ESR)
Obtain blood cultures and urine culture
Perform urinalysis to check for hematuria or proteinuria
Initiate empiric intravenous antibiotics (e.g., ceftriaxone) pending culture results
Obtain echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery involvement
Perform an ophthalmologic examination and dermatology consultation
Consider skin biopsy for immunofluorescence if the diagnosis remains unclear

differential_diagnoses: Systemic viral infection (e.g., Adenovirus or Enterovirus)
next_steps: Complete blood count with differential and peripheral smear
Inflammatory markers including CRP and ESR
Empiric intravenous antibiotics (ceftriaxone) pending sepsis evaluation
